Custom 404/405 handlers; handle for standard funcs, producers, and wrapped
registrations; static file trees.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/assets/style.css --
body {}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"net/http"
)

//fabrik:http:static /assets dir=assets
//
//go:embed assets
var Assets embed.FS

//fabrik:http:middleware name=nocache
func NoCache(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:notfound
func NotFound(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:methodnotallowed
func MethodNotAllowed(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /every
func Every(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /wrapped middleware=nocache
func Wrapped(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /metrics
func Metrics() http.Handler { return http.NotFoundHandler() }

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"io/fs"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Providers
	// embedded Assets, served under /assets
	webAssets, err := fs.Sub(web.Assets, "assets")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Handle("/assets/", http.StripPrefix("/assets", http.FileServerFS(webAssets)))
	r.NotFound(web.NotFound)
	r.MethodNotAllowed(web.MethodNotAllowed)
	r.HandleFunc("/every", web.Every)
	r.Handle("/wrapped", web.NoCache(http.HandlerFunc(web.Wrapped)))
	r.Handle("/metrics", web.Metrics())
	r.Method("GET", "/{$}", web.Index)

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- HTTPServer(ctx, r) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func HTTPServer(ctx context.Context, r *router.Router) error {
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr}
	srv.Handler = r
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if srv.TLSConfig != nil {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServeTLS("", "")
		} else {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServe()
		}
	}()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
